title: Table Sizes
content:
### HTML Table Sizes --- ### Table Width ```html
``` --- ### Column Width ```html
Name Email Phone
``` Set width on header cells to control entire columns. --- ### Row Height ```html
Tall row
Short row
``` --- ### Min/Max Width ```html
``` --- ### Percentage vs Fixed | Unit | Behavior | |------|----------| | `%` | Relative to parent container | | `px` | Fixed size, does not change | | `em` | Relative to font size | | `auto` | Shrinks to fit content | --- ### Content-Based Width If no width is set, columns resize automatically based on content: ```html
Short This cell has very long content that stretches
``` > **Best Practice:** Set `width: 100%` on tables for responsive layouts. Use percentage values for columns to adapt to different screen sizes.
codeExample:
Name Email Status
Alice alice@example.com Active

quiz.question: What is the best unit for responsive table width?
